metadata.description: Local-first code intelligence MCP for Cursor. Indexes your codebase with Tree-sitter symbol parsing, SQLite dependency graph, and BM25 full-text search — all on your machine. No cloud. No embeddings API. No data leaves your machine.

plugins.name: open-kioku
plugins.description: Local-first code intelligence MCP — search, symbols, impact analysis, and patch planning for Cursor.
